title: Make optimizer target score fail on missing metadata instead of returning NA

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Confirmed the immediate cause: the score YAML for Income and Name Alignment Metadata AI explicitly says 'Mark NA if one or more Metadata values appear blank'. This is score-level behavior, not optimizer-core behavior. Investigating the clean score-level way to raise a hard execution failure before classification when required metadata is blank.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: User clarified the required distinction: missing metadata.other_data payload must hard-fail; missing/blank score-specific fields inside otherwise-present metadata can remain score-level logic (including NA if appropriate). Reworking the draft score patch to target only missing other_data, not every blank field.
